_meta.description: Complete 37-agent registry for Claude Architect OS / Loki Mode

discover.label: DISCOVER
discover.description: Understand requirements, market, and users before any design begins

design.label: DESIGN
design.description: Produce architecture, API spec, DB schema, and component contracts

quality.label: QUALITY
quality.description: All quality agents must pass before DEPLOY phase begins

deploy.label: DEPLOY
deploy.description: Deploy to production in order: devops-architect then deployment-engineer

monetize.label: MONETIZE
monetize.description: Runs in parallel with DEPLOY — monetization readiness should not block deployment

operate.label: OPERATE
operate.description: Continuous feedback loop — all operate agents run on schedule

agents.name: Requirements Analyst
agents.description: Extracts, clarifies, and formalizes product requirements from natural language. Detects ambiguities, conflicting requirements, and missing acceptance criteria.
agents.quality_gate: All functional requirements have at least one acceptance criterion. Zero unresolved ambiguities.

agents.name: Product Manager
agents.description: Translates requirements into product scope, feature prioritization (MoSCoW), success metrics, and a phased roadmap. Balances business value against technical effort.
agents.quality_gate: MVP scope defined. All features have priority, effort estimate, and success metric.

agents.name: Market Researcher
agents.description: Analyzes market size, demand signals, competitive landscape, pricing benchmarks, and target audience. Scores opportunity viability using the standard asymmetry formula.
agents.quality_gate: Opportunity score computed. At least 3 competitors analyzed. Pricing range established.

agents.name: UX Researcher
agents.description: Maps user journeys, identifies critical pain points, defines user personas, and establishes UX success criteria. Ensures the product solves real user problems.
agents.quality_gate: At least 2 personas. Critical user journey mapped end-to-end. Top 3 pain points documented.

agents.name: Deep Research Agent
agents.description: Conducts exhaustive multi-source research on any topic. Synthesizes findings with confidence scoring, source attribution, and actionable conclusions.
agents.quality_gate: Minimum 5 sources. All findings have confidence scores. Action recommendations provided.

agents.name: Repo Index Agent
agents.description: Indexes and compresses repository context using Repomix. Maps codebase structure, extracts key interfaces, and produces a compressed context file for downstream agents.
agents.quality_gate: Compressed context under 30K tokens. Tech stack identified. Key interfaces documented.

agents.name: Deep Research (Technical)
agents.description: Alternative deep research agent specializing in technical domains — academic papers, patent searches, technical documentation, and implementation reference finding.
agents.quality_gate: At least one reference implementation found. Recommended approach justified with evidence.

agents.name: System Architect
agents.description: Designs high-level system architecture, component boundaries, data flows, and failure modes. Produces the master architecture document that all other design agents reference.
agents.quality_gate: All components defined with interfaces. All critical failure modes addressed. ADRs written for each major decision.

agents.name: API Architect
agents.description: Designs RESTful and/or GraphQL APIs with OpenAPI 3.0 spec, authentication flows, rate limiting strategy, versioning, and error response standards.
agents.quality_gate: Full OpenAPI 3.0 spec. All endpoints have auth requirements. Error codes standardized.

agents.name: Database Architect
agents.description: Designs normalized database schemas with proper indexing, foreign key constraints, RLS policies, migration strategy, and query performance considerations.
agents.quality_gate: All tables have PKs, appropriate indexes, and RLS policies. Migration plan is reversible.

agents.name: Frontend Architect
agents.description: Designs component hierarchy, state management approach, routing, performance budget, and accessibility standards for web and mobile frontends.
agents.quality_gate: Component tree complete. State management justified. Performance budget defined with LCP/FID/CLS targets.

agents.name: Backend Architect
agents.description: Designs server-side service boundaries, data pipeline architecture, caching strategy, background job processing, and security patterns for all backend services.
agents.quality_gate: All service contracts defined. Caching strategy addresses hot paths. Security patterns applied to all data access.

agents.name: Python Expert
agents.description: Implements Python services, FastAPI endpoints, data processing pipelines, and ML integrations. Produces clean, tested, type-annotated Python with proper error handling.
agents.quality_gate: All code is type-annotated. Unit test coverage >= 80%. No bare except clauses.

agents.name: Data Engineer
agents.description: Builds ETL pipelines, streaming data processors, analytics queries, and data warehouse schemas. Specializes in batch and real-time data movement.
agents.quality_gate: Pipeline is idempotent. Data quality checks cover all critical fields. Run instructions tested.

agents.name: ML Engineer
agents.description: Implements ML model training, evaluation, and inference pipelines. Integrates embedding models, fine-tuning workflows, and model evaluation harnesses.
agents.quality_gate: Evaluation results meet defined criteria. Inference latency p99 within budget. Model card complete.

agents.name: Integration Specialist
agents.description: Implements external API integrations, webhook handlers, OAuth flows, n8n workflow automation nodes, and third-party service connections.
agents.quality_gate: All integrations have retry logic. Webhook endpoints validate signatures. OAuth flow handles refresh.

agents.name: Prompt Engineer
agents.description: Designs, optimizes, and evaluates prompts for all AI system components. Implements few-shot examples, chain-of-thought patterns, and structured output constraints.
agents.quality_gate: All test cases pass. Token count within model context limits. Output structure validated against schema.

agents.name: Code Reviewer
agents.description: Reviews all produced code for correctness, maintainability, naming conventions, code smells, and adherence to the project's coding standards.
agents.quality_gate: Quality score >= 0.75 required to pass. All P0/P1 issues must be resolved before approval.

agents.name: Security Engineer
agents.description: Audits code and infrastructure for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, authentication flaws, authorization bypasses, secrets exposure, and injection attacks.
agents.quality_gate: Zero critical vulnerabilities. Zero secrets in code. All auth paths verified. Deploy BLOCKED if critical issues found.

agents.name: Quality Engineer
agents.description: Defines and executes quality gates, acceptance testing, and regression suites. Produces pass/fail verdicts for all acceptance criteria.
agents.quality_gate: 100% of P0 acceptance criteria pass. >= 90% of P1 criteria pass.

agents.name: Test Architect
agents.description: Designs comprehensive automated test strategies including unit, integration, contract, and e2e tests. Produces runnable test suites.
agents.quality_gate: Unit coverage >= 80%. All public interfaces have contract tests. E2e covers all critical user flows.

agents.name: Dependency Auditor
agents.description: Audits all project dependencies for known CVEs, incompatible licenses, unmaintained packages, and unnecessary bloat.
agents.quality_gate: Zero critical CVEs. No license violations. All outdated packages have upgrade path.

agents.name: Performance Engineer
agents.description: Profiles system performance, identifies bottlenecks, designs load tests, and validates that performance budgets are met before deployment.
agents.quality_gate: p99 latency within budget. No memory leaks detected. Database queries have EXPLAIN ANALYZE passing.

agents.name: Root Cause Analyst
agents.description: Investigates any failures surfaced by other quality agents. Uses 5-whys analysis to find systemic root causes and prevent recurrence.
agents.quality_gate: Root cause identified and actionable. Remediation steps are concrete and assigned.

agents.name: DevOps Architect
agents.description: Designs CI/CD pipelines, Dockerfile configurations, infrastructure-as-code, monitoring stack, and deployment strategies (blue/green, canary).
agents.quality_gate: Dockerfile uses multi-stage build. CI/CD has rollback step. Monitoring covers all critical paths.

agents.name: Deployment Engineer
agents.description: Executes the deployment using the DevOps artifact. Runs smoke tests, validates health endpoints, and confirms production readiness. Has rollback authority.
agents.quality_gate: All health checks passing. Smoke tests pass. Deployment URL accessible.

agents.name: Monetization Strategist
agents.description: Designs revenue models, pricing tiers, growth loops, and monetization infrastructure. Optimizes for LTV, reduces churn, and identifies upsell paths.
agents.quality_gate: Pricing tiers justified by willingness-to-pay data. MRR projection has assumptions documented.

agents.name: Content Strategist
agents.description: Plans content marketing strategy for acquisition, activation, and retention. Produces content calendar, SEO keywords, and social media execution plan.
agents.quality_gate: 30-day content calendar complete. SEO keywords have search volume data. Email sequence covers onboarding.

agents.name: Business Panel Experts
agents.description: Multi-perspective business review from CEO (vision/strategy), CFO (unit economics/financial viability), and CMO (go-to-market/brand) viewpoints. Surfaces risks and blind spots.
agents.quality_gate: All three C-suite perspectives provided. Top risks documented. Go/No-Go decision rendered with rationale.

agents.name: Metrics Analyst
agents.description: Monitors key performance indicators, detects anomalies, produces trend analysis, and triggers alerts when metrics deviate from expected ranges.
agents.quality_gate: All tracked KPIs reported. Anomalies have severity classification. Recommended actions are time-bounded.

agents.name: PM Agent
agents.description: Tracks project velocity, coordinates ongoing work, resolves blockers, updates priorities based on new information, and ensures the build pipeline remains unblocked.
agents.quality_gate: All blockers have owners and ETAs. Priority list is actionable and sorted.

agents.name: Self Review Agent
agents.description: Compares system outputs against original objectives. Identifies gaps, regressions, and drift. Triggers improvement cycles when quality drops below threshold.
agents.quality_gate: Comparison is objective and evidence-based. All gaps have root cause analysis.

agents.name: Technical Writer
agents.description: Produces API reference documentation, runbooks, architecture decision records, deployment guides, and user-facing documentation from code and design artifacts.
agents.quality_gate: All public APIs documented. Runbooks are actionable without prior context. Changelog is accurate.

agents.name: Refactoring Expert
agents.description: Identifies code quality issues, tech debt, performance bottlenecks, and architectural drift. Produces safe, incremental refactoring plans with measurable outcomes.
agents.quality_gate: Refactoring plan has no breaking changes. Each step is independently deployable.

agents.name: Learning Guide
agents.description: Synthesizes learnings from completed sessions and builds into the memory system. Produces Karpathy-style wrapups, updates patterns.json, and generates training examples.
agents.quality_gate: New patterns have confidence scores. Karpathy wrapup has 3 wins, 3 failures, 3 insights minimum.

agents.name: Socratic Mentor
agents.description: Facilitates deep thinking through structured Socratic questioning. Challenges assumptions, reveals hidden dependencies, and ensures decisions are fully examined before commitment.
agents.quality_gate: At least 5 questions generated. All critical assumptions challenged. Refined position is more rigorous than initial.

loki_coordinator.name: Loki Coordinator
loki_coordinator.description: Master orchestrator for the 37-agent Loki Mode pipeline. Manages phase transitions, enforces quality gates, handles agent failures, and maintains global state.
